items.name: Urban Street High-Top Canvas Sneakers
items.description:
"Elevate your sneaker game with these stylish high-top canvas sneakers in a soft beige pink color. Featuring a chunky dark beige sole for a bold contrast, these trendy sneakers perfectly blend navy and light beige pink tones. Ideal for casual outings or street style looks, they provide both comfort and flair, making them a must-have addition to any avatar's footwear collection.
